purpose: Sync approved job requisitions from Workday to Avature for job posting.
dependency: Workday is the source of truth for requisitions.

purpose: Sync candidate screening and interview statuses back to Workday.
dependency: Avature is the source of truth for candidate progress.

purpose: Trigger access provisioning workflows when a new hire is created.
dependency: Workday new hire events must be published for provisioning.

purpose: Provision user accounts and assign access based on approved requests.
dependency: ServiceNow workflows must complete before provisioning.

purpose: Acts as the integration gateway for Workday APIs and transformations.
dependency: MuleSoft must be available for API routing.
